title: Manitowoc 3900W - Annual Load Test & Certification
description: Annual load test performed at 125% rated capacity. All hoist rope inspected - main and auxiliary in good condition. Slewing ring lubricated and gear backlash checked within spec. Boom chord and lacework visual inspection - no cracks found. Limit switches tested. Annual certification renewed.

title: CAT 336 - 1000 Hour Service
description: Engine oil and filter changed. Hydraulic filter replaced. Fuel filter replaced. Track tension adjusted - both sides. Bucket pin and bushing greased. All cylinders inspected - no leaks. Undercarriage at 75% remaining. Swing motor oil checked and topped.

title: Putzmeister 58Z - Concrete Line Cleaning and Inspection
description: Post-pour concrete line fully flushed and cleaned. Boom pivot pins and cylinders inspected and greased. S-tube wear inspected - acceptable. Delivery cylinder wall checked - 85% remaining life. Hydraulic fluid level checked and topped. All safety relief valves tested.

title: JLG 600S - Annual Inspection & ANSI A92 Compliance
description: Annual inspection per ANSI A92.20. Platform load cell calibrated. All limit switches tested. Outrigger pads and sensors checked. Hydraulic system fluid and filters changed. Battery terminals cleaned and load tested. Operator manual and load chart in platform.

title: Mack #1 - DOT Annual Inspection
description: Full DOT annual inspection completed. Brakes adjusted and measured - all within spec. Tires inspected - 70% remaining front and rear. Lights and reflectors all operational. Frame inspected - no cracks. Air system leak tested. Exhaust emissions tested and compliant. DOT sticker issued.
